description: Expanded toxicity detection test set with 100+ labeled examples

categories.clean_request: Polite requests for information or assistance
categories.edge_idiom: Idiomatic expressions that may appear toxic
categories.edge_false_positive_risk: Text that commonly triggers false positives

test_cases.text: Hello, how are you today?
Good morning! Hope you're having a great day.
Hi there, nice to meet you.
Greetings and salutations!
Hey, how's it going?
Good afternoon everyone.
Welcome to the team!
Nice to hear from you again.

Pleasure to make your acquaintance.

I disagree with your opinion on the policy.

I appreciate your time and effort on this.

I'm looking forward to the weekend.

Thanks for letting me know about the change.
I hope you have a safe trip home.
